item.title: 9.22]AI大小事#5 音樂音效生成AI，一萬句計畫艾粒TTS模型開源
item.itunes:title: 9.22]AI大小事#5 音樂音效生成AI，一萬句計畫艾粒TTS模型開源
item.itunes:author: 杰克艾米立
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VZUhjziIEoA 9/22 AI大小事 Discord: https://discord.gg/TM5d89YNwA FB粉專: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090228987264 成為這個頻道的會員並獲得福利： https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCine3_lVU-rFDRRI8xeImHA/join 抖內JackEllie(本功能沒有任何福利，但謝謝你的錢): https://www.buymeacoffee.com/otakuya202y 我們的twitch(每周1235晚上9點開台): https://www.twitch.tv/otakuya2022 ===================================================================== DALL-E-3 https://openai.com/dall-e-3 Stable Audio(可以每個月免費生成20首) https://stableaudio.com/ ===================================================================== Audiocraft_plus(Audiocraft介面) 官方連結: https://github.com/GrandaddyShmax/audiocraft_plus 自動安裝\u0026啟動程序(內附安裝使用說明) https://github.com/JackEllie/audiocraft_plus_setup/releases/download/V0/audiocraft_plus.rar 建議搭配ChatGPT 你可以這樣問: 請用類似下方這樣的提詞方式 Trance, Ibiza, Beach, Sun, 4 AM, Progressive, Synthesizer, 909, Dramatic Chords, Choir, Euphoric, Nostalgic, Dynamic, Flowing 幫我改成一套中國古風音樂的提示，以英文表示 ===================================================================== 艾粒TTS模型(內附安裝使用說明) 載點: https://huggingface.co/Jackellie/ellie-Bert-VITS2/resolve/main/ellie_Bert-VITS2.rar bert-vits2官方連結: https://github.com/fishaudio/Bert-VITS2 ===================================================================== #stablediffusion #aidrawing #ai繪圖 #aiart #aigc # audiocraft
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VZUhjziIEoA 9/22 AI大小事 Discord: https://discord.gg/TM5d89YNwA FB粉專: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090228987264 成為這個頻道的會員並獲得福利： https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCine3_lVU-rFDRRI8xeImHA/join 抖內JackEllie(本功能沒有任何福利，但謝謝你的錢): https://www.buymeacoffee.com/otakuya202y 我們的twitch(每周1235晚上9點開台): https://www.twitch.tv/otakuya2022 ===================================================================== DALL-E-3 https://openai.com/dall-e-3 Stable Audio(可以每個月免費生成20首) https://stableaudio.com/ ===================================================================== Audiocraft_plus(Audiocraft介面) 官方連結: https://github.com/GrandaddyShmax/audiocraft_plus 自動安裝\u0026啟動程序(內附安裝使用說明) https://github.com/JackEllie/audiocraft_plus_setup/releases/download/V0/audiocraft_plus.rar 建議搭配ChatGPT 你可以這樣問: 請用類似下方這樣的提詞方式 Trance, Ibiza, Beach, Sun, 4 AM, Progressive, Synthesizer, 909, Dramatic Chords, Choir, Euphoric, Nostalgic, Dynamic, Flowing 幫我改成一套中國古風音樂的提示，以英文表示 ===================================================================== 艾粒TTS模型(內附安裝使用說明) 載點: https://huggingface.co/Jackellie/ellie-Bert-VITS2/resolve/main/ellie_Bert-VITS2.rar bert-vits2官方連結: https://github.com/fishaudio/Bert-VITS2 ===================================================================== #stablediffusion #aidrawing #ai繪圖 #aiart #aigc # audiocraft
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VZUhjziIEoA
9/22 AI大小事

Discord: https://discord.gg/TM5d89YNwA 
FB粉專: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090228987264 
成為這個頻道的會員並獲得福利：
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCine3_lVU-rFDRRI8xeImHA/join
抖內JackEllie(本功能沒有任何福利，但謝謝你的錢): 
https://www.buymeacoffee.com/otakuya202y 
我們的twitch(每周1235晚上9點開台): https://www.twitch.tv/otakuya2022

=====================================================================

DALL-E-3
https://openai.com/dall-e-3

Stable Audio(可以每個月免費生成20首)
https://stableaudio.com/

=====================================================================

Audiocraft_plus(Audiocraft介面)
官方連結:
https://github.com/GrandaddyShmax/audiocraft_plus

自動安裝\u0026啟動程序(內附安裝使用說明)
https://github.com/JackEllie/audiocraft_plus_setup/releases/download/V0/audiocraft_plus.rar

建議搭配ChatGPT

你可以這樣問:

請用類似下方這樣的提詞方式
Trance, Ibiza, Beach, Sun, 4 AM, Progressive, Synthesizer, 909, Dramatic Chords, Choir, Euphoric, Nostalgic, Dynamic, Flowing
幫我改成一套中國古風音樂的提示，以英文表示
=====================================================================

艾粒TTS模型(內附安裝使用說明)
載點:
https://huggingface.co/Jackellie/ellie-Bert-VITS2/resolve/main/ellie_Bert-VITS2.rar

bert-vits2官方連結:
https://github.com/fishaudio/Bert-VITS2

=====================================================================

#stablediffusion #aidrawing #ai繪圖 #aiart #aigc # audiocraft

item.title: 9.15]AI大小事#4，DragDiffusion測試心得，Midjourney終結者FooocusV2
item.itunes:title: 9.15]AI大小事#4，DragDiffusion測試心得，Midjourney終結者FooocusV2
item.itunes:author: 杰克艾米立
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cujji_1syoA 9/15的AI大小事。 Discord: https://discord.gg/TM5d89YNwA FB粉專: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090228987264 抖內JackEllie(本功能沒有任何福利，但謝謝你的錢): https://www.buymeacoffee.com/otakuya202y DragDiffusion懶人包: https://github.com/JackEllie/DragDiffusion-windows/releases/download/v1.0.0/DragDiffusion_windows.rar Fooocus標準版: https://github.com/lllyasviel/Fooocus/releases/download/release/Fooocus_win64_2-0-0.7z Fooocus-MRE版: https://github.com/MoonRide303/Fooocus-MRE/releases/download/v2.0.3/Fooocus-MRE-v2.0.3.7z #stablediffusion #aidrawing #ai繪圖 #aiart #aigc #fooocus #dragdiffusion #draggan
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cujji_1syoA 9/15的AI大小事。 Discord: https://discord.gg/TM5d89YNwA FB粉專: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090228987264 抖內JackEllie(本功能沒有任何福利，但謝謝你的錢): https://www.buymeacoffee.com/otakuya202y DragDiffusion懶人包: https://github.com/JackEllie/DragDiffusion-windows/releases/download/v1.0.0/DragDiffusion_windows.rar Fooocus標準版: https://github.com/lllyasviel/Fooocus/releases/download/release/Fooocus_win64_2-0-0.7z Fooocus-MRE版: https://github.com/MoonRide303/Fooocus-MRE/releases/download/v2.0.3/Fooocus-MRE-v2.0.3.7z #stablediffusion #aidrawing #ai繪圖 #aiart #aigc #fooocus #dragdiffusion #draggan

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cujji_1syoA

Discord: https://discord.gg/TM5d89YNwA 
FB粉專: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090228987264

item.title: 9.8]AI大小事#3，SDXL Controlnet大亂鬥?我們的QRControlnet即將開源，最強動畫模型控制方案即將公開，關於艾粒的聲音進度?
item.itunes:title: 9.8]AI大小事#3，SDXL Controlnet大亂鬥?我們的QRControlnet即將開源，最強動畫模型控制方案即將公開，關於艾粒的聲音進度?
item.itunes:author: 杰克艾米立
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oTYiHWArPJY 9/8 AI大小事~ Discord: https://discord.gg/TM5d89YNwA FB粉專: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090228987264 抖內JackEllie(本功能沒有任何福利，但謝謝你的錢): https://www.buymeacoffee.com/otakuya202y 我們的twitch(每周1235晚上9點開台): https://www.twitch.tv/otakuya2022 影片中提到的SDXL Controlnet下載網址: Canny https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/sai_xl_canny_256lora.safetensors Depth https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/sai_xl_depth_256lora.safetensors Openpose https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/thibaud_xl_openpose.safetensors Softedge?(請使用sketch模型) https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/sai_xl_sketch_256lora.safetensors Recolor https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/sai_xl_recolor_256lora.safetensors IP-Adapter SD1.5版 https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/ip-adapter_sd15.pth https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/ip-adapter_sd15_plus.pth SDXL版 https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/ip-adapter_xl.pth QR Bocca(QRControlnet) 於10/6號開源目前為會員獨享，會員請查閱社群。 AnimateDiff WebUI擴充網址: https://github.com/continue-revolution/sd-webui-animatediff.git 艾粒的TTS，將於訓練完成後開源!! #stablediffusion #aidrawing #ai繪圖 #aiart #aigc #sdxl #controlnet #TTS #qrcode
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oTYiHWArPJY 9/8 AI大小事~ Discord: https://discord.gg/TM5d89YNwA FB粉專: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090228987264 抖內JackEllie(本功能沒有任何福利，但謝謝你的錢): https://www.buymeacoffee.com/otakuya202y 我們的twitch(每周1235晚上9點開台): https://www.twitch.tv/otakuya2022 影片中提到的SDXL Controlnet下載網址: Canny https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/sai_xl_canny_256lora.safetensors Depth https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/sai_xl_depth_256lora.safetensors Openpose https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/thibaud_xl_openpose.safetensors Softedge?(請使用sketch模型) https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/sai_xl_sketch_256lora.safetensors Recolor https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/sai_xl_recolor_256lora.safetensors IP-Adapter SD1.5版 https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/ip-adapter_sd15.pth https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/ip-adapter_sd15_plus.pth SDXL版 https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/ip-adapter_xl.pth QR Bocca(QRControlnet) 於10/6號開源目前為會員獨享，會員請查閱社群。 AnimateDiff WebUI擴充網址: https://github.com/continue-revolution/sd-webui-animatediff.git 艾粒的TTS，將於訓練完成後開源!! #stablediffusion #aidrawing #ai繪圖 #aiart #aigc #sdxl #controlnet #TTS #qrcode
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oTYiHWArPJY
9/8 AI大小事~

Discord: https://discord.gg/TM5d89YNwA 
FB粉專: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090228987264 
抖內JackEllie(本功能沒有任何福利，但謝謝你的錢): https://www.buymeacoffee.com/otakuya202y 
我們的twitch(每周1235晚上9點開台): https://www.twitch.tv/otakuya2022

影片中提到的SDXL Controlnet下載網址:

Canny
https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/sai_xl_canny_256lora.safetensors

Depth
https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/sai_xl_depth_256lora.safetensors

Openpose
https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/thibaud_xl_openpose.safetensors

Softedge?(請使用sketch模型)
https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/sai_xl_sketch_256lora.safetensors

Recolor
https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/sai_xl_recolor_256lora.safetensors

IP-Adapter
SD1.5版
https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/ip-adapter_sd15.pth
https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/ip-adapter_sd15_plus.pth
SDXL版
https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/sd_control_collection/resolve/main/ip-adapter_xl.pth

QR Bocca(QRControlnet)
於10/6號開源目前為會員獨享，會員請查閱社群。

AnimateDiff WebUI擴充網址:
https://github.com/continue-revolution/sd-webui-animatediff.git

艾粒的TTS，將於訓練完成後開源!!

#stablediffusion #aidrawing #ai繪圖 #aiart #aigc #sdxl #controlnet #TTS #qrcode

item.title: 9.1]AI大小事#2，翻譯蒟蒻誕生?最強語音模型開源?WebUI1.6正式登陸!!
item.itunes:title: 9.1]AI大小事#2，翻譯蒟蒻誕生?最強語音模型開源?WebUI1.6正式登陸!!
item.itunes:author: 杰克艾米立
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VsgDKHmidbg 本篇為9/1號近期AI大小事!! Discord: https://discord.gg/TM5d89YNwA FB粉專: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090228987264 抖內JackEllie(本功能沒有任何福利，但謝謝你的錢): https://www.buymeacoffee.com/otakuya202y 我們的twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/otakuya2022 SeamlessM4T官方資料庫: https://github.com/facebookresearch/seamless_communication SeamlessM4T試用: https://seamless.metademolab.com/ VALL-E-X(非微軟版本): https://github.com/Plachtaa/VALL-E-X ComfyUI(安裝程式): https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/releases/download/latest/ComfyUI_windows_portable_nvidia_cu118_or_cpu.7z 安裝方法: 下載後點選run_nvidia_gpu.bat即可啟動，但須要另外下載模型到ComfyUI\\models\\checkpoints，資料庫共用方法未來會在試用篇提供。 WEBUI1.6更新內容: https://github.com/AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui/releases/tag/v1.6.0 #stablediffusion #aidrawing #ai繪圖 #aiart #aigc #sdxl #seamlessm4t #vallex
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VsgDKHmidbg 本篇為9/1號近期AI大小事!! Discord: https://discord.gg/TM5d89YNwA FB粉專: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090228987264 抖內JackEllie(本功能沒有任何福利，但謝謝你的錢): https://www.buymeacoffee.com/otakuya202y 我們的twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/otakuya2022 SeamlessM4T官方資料庫: https://github.com/facebookresearch/seamless_communication SeamlessM4T試用: https://seamless.metademolab.com/ VALL-E-X(非微軟版本): https://github.com/Plachtaa/VALL-E-X ComfyUI(安裝程式): https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/releases/download/latest/ComfyUI_windows_portable_nvidia_cu118_or_cpu.7z 安裝方法: 下載後點選run_nvidia_gpu.bat即可啟動，但須要另外下載模型到ComfyUI\\models\\checkpoints，資料庫共用方法未來會在試用篇提供。 WEBUI1.6更新內容: https://github.com/AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui/releases/tag/v1.6.0 #stablediffusion #aidrawing #ai繪圖 #aiart #aigc #sdxl #seamlessm4t #vallex
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VsgDKHmidbg
本篇為9/1號近期AI大小事!!

Discord: https://discord.gg/TM5d89YNwA 
FB粉專: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090228987264 
抖內JackEllie(本功能沒有任何福利，但謝謝你的錢): https://www.buymeacoffee.com/otakuya202y 
我們的twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/otakuya2022 

SeamlessM4T官方資料庫: https://github.com/facebookresearch/seamless_communication

SeamlessM4T試用: https://seamless.metademolab.com/

VALL-E-X(非微軟版本): https://github.com/Plachtaa/VALL-E-X 

ComfyUI(安裝程式): https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/releases/download/latest/ComfyUI_windows_portable_nvidia_cu118_or_cpu.7z

安裝方法:
下載後點選run_nvidia_gpu.bat即可啟動，但須要另外下載模型到ComfyUI\\models\\checkpoints，資料庫共用方法未來會在試用篇提供。

WEBUI1.6更新內容:
https://github.com/AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui/releases/tag/v1.6.0

#stablediffusion #aidrawing #ai繪圖 #aiart #aigc #sdxl #seamlessm4t #vallex

item.title: 8.25]AI大小事#1，最友善SDXL使用者介面??SDXL Controlnet登場?Roop於在道德壓力下停止更新!!??爆紅桌球機器人??
item.itunes:title: 8.25]AI大小事#1，最友善SDXL使用者介面??SDXL Controlnet登場?Roop於在道德壓力下停止更新!!??爆紅桌球機器人??
item.itunes:author: 杰克艾米立
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LCdxykuvnHs 本篇為8/25號近期AI大小事，未來沒意外的話會以每週更新的方式進行AI每週報分享~ Discord: https://discord.gg/TM5d89YNwA FB粉專: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090228987264 抖內JackEllie(本功能沒有任何福利，但謝謝你的錢): https://www.buymeacoffee.com/otakuya202y twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/otakuya2022 fooocus載點: Windows以外系統無法懶人安裝 https://github.com/lllyasviel/Fooocus/releases control lora載點: https://huggingface.co/stabilityai/control-lora/tree/main wonderdynamics官網: https://wonderdynamics.com/ #stablediffusion #aidrawing #ai繪圖 #aiart #aigc #sdxl #ControlNet #roop #wonderdynamics # Fooocus

item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LCdxykuvnHs
本篇為8/25號近期AI大小事，未來沒意外的話會以每週更新的方式進行AI每週報分享~

Discord: https://discord.gg/TM5d89YNwA 
FB粉專: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090228987264 
抖內JackEllie(本功能沒有任何福利，但謝謝你的錢): https://www.buymeacoffee.com/otakuya202y
twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/otakuya2022 

fooocus載點: Windows以外系統無法懶人安裝
https://github.com/lllyasviel/Fooocus/releases

control lora載點:
https://huggingface.co/stabilityai/control-lora/tree/main

wonderdynamics官網:
https://wonderdynamics.com/

#stablediffusion #aidrawing #ai繪圖 #aiart #aigc #sdxl #ControlNet #roop #wonderdynamics # Fooocus
